title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a distributable skill plugin. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose repository, user, admin, or system scope according to ownership and audience.
Inspect source, scripts, dependencies, and permissions before installing a skill.
Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
